title: あなたはSecurity Analystです。OWASP Top 10を参考に分析します。 ## チェック項目 - SQLインジェクション - XSS - CSRF - 認証・認可の不備 - 機密情報のハードコード - コマンドインジェクション ## 評価（3点満点） 3点: 問題なし 2点: 軽微な懸念 1点: 要対応 0点: 重大な脆弱性 ## 出力形式（JSON） { "score": 0-3, "vulnerabilities": [{ "severity": "critical|high|medium|low", "type": "", "description": "", "rem...
summary_text: { "score": 1, "vulnerabilities": [ { "severity": "high", "type": "Secret Leakage in Progress Comments (OWASP A02/A09)", "description": "Assumption: Issue comments can be read by users beyond trusted operators. `postProgress()` in the problem-solver path posts analysis/execution content directly (including execution output preview and error snippets) without `maskSecrets()`. This creates a direct exfiltration path to GitHub comments. If repository visibility is broad/public, impact is effectively critical.", "remediation": "Apply a single outbound sanitizer/DLP pipeline to ALL GitHub comments (including phase-progress comments), not only final reports. Enforce truncation + redaction before `addComment()`, and add tests that simulate token/credential leakage in phase outputs." }, { "severity": "medium", "type": "DLP Coverage Gaps and Regex Bypass (OWASP A02)", "description": "`maskSecrets()` relies on limited regex patterns and misses common secret formats (e.g., AWS keys, JWT/base64 blobs, PEM blocks, multiline credentials, provider-specific tokens without current prefixes). It can be bypassed by formatting/encoding variations and does not cover every comment path.", "remediation": "Introduce layered DLP: provider-aware detectors, entropy-based secret scanning, multiline key detection, and pre-send policy checks. Block or require approval on high-confidence secret detection." }, { "severity": "medium", "type": "Safety Gate Weakening via `sanitizeForVote` (OWASP A04)", "description": "`sanitizeForVote()` intentionally obfuscates risky keywords before verification voting, which can suppress Level-1 safeguards in `consensus-vote.js`. This is a policy-bypass class issue: genuinely dangerous output may be transformed and no longer trigger confirmation.", "remediation": "Remove keyword obfuscation. Change vote logic to structured risk signaling (exact-token or semantic flags) and fail-safe behavior: risky signals should increase scrutiny, not be rewritten away." }, { "severity": "medium", "type": "Untrusted Input Propagation to Agent Prompt/Comments (OWASP A03/A04)", "description": "Untrusted issue title/body and agent outputs are propagated into prompts and GitHub markdown with minimal normalization. While classic browser XSS is unlikely on GitHub-rendered markdown, mention/link injection, social-engineering payloads, and prompt-injection effects remain realistic.", "remediation": "Treat issue/agent text as untrusted: enforce strict length limits, escape markdown control patterns (`@`, links, HTML-like tags), isolate raw text in fenced blocks, and add allowlist-based rendering for high-risk fields." }, { "severity": "low", "type": "Command Execution Trust Boundary Hardening (OWASP A05)", "description": "Direct command injection risk is reduced because `spawn()` is used with argument arrays (no shell). However, `PATH`/`HOME`/config-derived script paths and inherited environment create an execution trust boundary risk (env poisoning or path substitution in compromised runtime contexts).", "remediation": "Use `process.execPath` for Node binary, enforce absolute allowlisted script paths, validate file ownership/permissions, and minimize inherited environment variables." } ], "summary": "評価対象コードでは、SQLインジェクション・CSRF・典型的XSSの直接経路は確認できませんでした。一方で、(1) GitHub進捗コメント経由の機密漏えい、(2) DLP適用範囲/検知精度不足、(3) `sanitizeForVote` による安全判定バイパスが主要リスクです。優先度は「全コメント送信経路への統一DLP適用」と「投票安全判定ロジックの再設計」です。" }
